# Story 4.4: FE — Revenue by Payment Method + Top Products Display

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-16. Story context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As an admin,
I want xem doanh thu phân bổ theo phương thức thanh toán (tiền mặt/chuyển khoản/thẻ) và top sản phẩm bán chạy,
so that tôi biết khách hay trả bằng cách nào và món nào đang hot để ra quyết định vận hành nhanh.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Given Story 4.3 đã có `ReportsPage` fetch `GET /api/v1/reports?from=&to=&metric=all` bằng **một** TanStack Query call, when triển khai Story 4.4, then KHÔNG tạo query/fetch mới cho payment/top-products; chỉ truyền `query.data.revenueByPaymentMethod` và `query.data.topProducts` vào 2 section mới, giữ query key `['reports', from, to]` và contract `fetchReportsAll({ from, to })` hiện có.
2. Given section "Doanh thu theo phương thức thanh toán", when có data, then thay placeholder `data-testid="placeholder-section-3"` bằng component tại `pos-web/src/routes/admin/reports/sections/revenue-by-payment-method.tsx` render đủ 3 phương thức `cash`, `transfer`, `card` theo thứ tự này, kể cả row `orderCount=0`.
3. Given revenue-by-payment data, when render, then mỗi row hiển thị: label tiếng Việt (`cash` = "Tiền mặt", `transfer` = "Chuyển khoản", `card` = "Thẻ"), doanh thu bằng `formatVnd(revenue)`, số đơn bằng `Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN') + ' đơn'`, và percentage của tổng revenue trong section.
4. Given total payment revenue > 0, when tính percentage, then `percentage = revenue / sum(revenueByPaymentMethod[*].revenue) * 100`, hiển thị một chữ số thập phân tối đa bằng locale `vi-VN` (vd `66,7%`); tổng revenue = 0 thì mọi row hiển thị `0%` và text "Chưa có đơn" cho method có `orderCount=0`.
5. Given payment method visualization, when render, then dùng horizontal bar/table hybrid (khuyến nghị: table/list 3 rows + progress bar) hoặc Recharts horizontal bar chart; màu mapping bắt buộc: cash = `var(--color-primary)`, transfer = `var(--color-accent)`, card = secondary/neutral token (`var(--color-secondary)` nếu có, fallback class Tailwind neutral/surface-muted). KHÔNG dùng màu làm tín hiệu duy nhất — label text luôn hiện.
6. Given section "Top sản phẩm bán chạy", when có data, then thay placeholder `data-testid="placeholder-section-4"` bằng component tại `pos-web/src/routes/admin/reports/sections/top-products-table.tsx` render table với columns `#`, `Sản phẩm`, `Số lượng`, `Doanh thu`; dùng `productName` snapshot từ BE, `totalQuantity`, `totalRevenue` (`formatVnd`).
7. Given top products response từ BE đã sorted `totalQuantity DESC, productName ASC` và limit 10, when render lần đầu, then giữ default sort theo số lượng giảm dần; hiển thị tối đa 10 dòng, nếu `<10` thì hiển thị tất cả; KHÔNG join/link tới product detail vì sản phẩm có thể đã bị xóa.
8. Given admin muốn so sánh theo doanh thu, when click/toggle sort "Sắp xếp theo doanh thu", then table sort client-side theo `totalRevenue DESC`, tie-breaker `productName ASC`; toggle lại/option "Sắp xếp theo số lượng" trả về `totalQuantity DESC`, tie-breaker `productName ASC`. Sort không mutate prop array gốc.
9. Given rank 1–3, when table render, then hiển thị badge nhẹ hoặc medal text/icon accessible cho top 1/2/3 (vd `Top 1`, `Top 2`, `Top 3` hoặc 🥇/🥈/🥉 kèm `aria-label`); rank 4–10 hiển thị số thường. Không dùng màu duy nhất để biểu thị rank.
10. Given product name snapshot từ đơn cũ hoặc sản phẩm đã DELETE, when render top products, then vẫn hiển thị raw escaped React text trong `productName`; không ẩn, không link, không gọi API products, không dùng `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.
11. Given page empty state từ Story 4.2 (`isEmptyResponse` true), when no orders trong range, then 2 section Story 4.4 cũng render `EmptyState` của `SectionCard` với title "Chưa có đơn đã đồng bộ trong khoảng ngày này." và description "Báo cáo chỉ tính đơn đã đồng bộ lên server."; component con không tự hiện empty trùng lặp nếu parent đã empty.
12. Given background refetch khi đổi date range hoặc window focus, when `query.isFetching && !query.isLoading`, then 2 section mới giữ last data và hiển thị indicator `Đang cập nhật` với `aria-live="polite"`, nhất quán với `RevenueByDayChart` và `TotalOrdersSummary`; skeleton chỉ xuất hiện first load.
13. Given accessibility, when screen reader/keyboard dùng page, then payment method section có accessible summary (`aria-label` hoặc caption) và top products table có `<caption className="sr-only">Top sản phẩm bán chạy</caption>`; sort controls là `<button>` có `aria-pressed` hoặc `aria-sort` rõ; focus indicator không bị xóa; touch target ≥44px cho interactive controls.
14. Given responsive admin layout, when viewport mobile/tablet/desktop, then 2 component mới không overflow xấu: payment rows wrap hợp lý; top products table dùng `overflow-x-auto` như pattern hiện có; grid 4 cards từ Story 4.2 giữ nguyên `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2`.
15. Given print view optional trong Epic, when developer có thời gian, then thêm CSS print minimal ở route/component hoặc stylesheet hiện có để reports in-friendly: nav/sidebar không cần đổi nếu layout global đã handle; ưu tiên section cards đọc theo flow, tránh progress bar bị mất ý nghĩa bằng text values. Nếu không làm print, ghi rõ trong Dev Agent Record là optional out-of-scope, không fail AC bắt buộc.
16. Given tests, when chạy `npm test -- reports`, then cover tối thiểu:
    - ReportsPage render đủ 4 metrics từ mock `successResponse` và không còn placeholder Story 4.4.
    - API vẫn gọi đúng **một** lần `/reports` với `{ from, to, metric: 'all' }`.
    - Payment labels tiếng Việt đúng, đủ 3 rows, method 0 đơn hiện "Chưa có đơn"/`0%`.
    - Percentages tính đúng trên tổng revenue payment methods, including total revenue = 0.
    - Top products render product snapshot, rank 1–3 badge/medal, default sort quantity desc, toggle revenue desc.
    - Empty response vẫn hiện 4 EmptyState (không duplicate custom empty trong child).
    - Date range change/refetch behavior từ Story 4.2/4.3 không regression; TZ hint "Tính theo giờ Việt Nam (UTC+7)" vẫn visible.
17. Given gates, when hoàn tất, then từ `pos-web/` chạy và document: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, `npm run build`; không thêm dependency mới trừ khi có lý do cực mạnh. Reuse `recharts` only if chọn chart; preferred implementation không cần thêm library.

## Dev Notes

### Source Requirements

- Epic 4 Story 4.4 trong `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md` (section "Story 4.4: FE — Revenue by Payment Method + Top Products Display").
- Epic 4 dependencies: 4.1 BE reports endpoint done, 4.2 reports page foundation done, 4.3 revenue-by-day + totals done.
- UX reports journey: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/ux-design-specification.md` section "Admin xem báo cáo" — server data only, empty/error friendly, timezone clarity.
- Architecture: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md` lines around route/API structure: reports endpoint `/api/v1/reports`, FE route `routes/admin/reports/reports-page.tsx`, feature API under `features/admin/reports/api.ts`.
- Project context: `_bmad-output/project-context.md` rules: React/Vite/TypeScript strict, feature module boundaries, no business logic in `common`, reports endpoint bearer + admin, VND integer formatting.

### Current Code State (must preserve)

`pos-web/src/routes/admin/reports/reports-page.tsx` currently:
- Parses `from`/`to` URL params, canonicalizes missing/invalid/reversed range.
- Defaults to last 7 Vietnam-local days via `computePreset('last7Days')`.
- Validates future dates and max 90 days; disables query when invalid.
- Calls `useQuery({ queryKey: reportsQueryKey(from, to), queryFn: () => fetchReportsAll({ from, to }), staleTime: 30_000 })`.
- Handles 400 Problem Details as inline filter error; handles 5xx/network as global `ErrorState`.
- Computes global empty when totals/order counts are all zero and topProducts is empty.
- Renders 4 `SectionCard`s. First two are implemented by Story 4.3; last two are placeholders for this story.

Do not regress any of the above. This story only replaces the last two section children.

### API Contract (already implemented by BE + typed in FE)

`fetchReportsAll({ from, to })` calls:

```ts
apiClient.get<ReportsAllResponse>('/reports', {
  params: { from, to, metric: 'all' },
})
```

Relevant response fields:

```ts
type RevenueByPaymentMethodRow = {
  paymentMethod: 'cash' | 'transfer' | 'card'
  revenue: number
  orderCount: number
}

type TopProductRow = {
  productName: string
  totalQuantity: number
  totalRevenue: number
}
```

BE contract guarantees payment methods return đủ 3 rows and top products are already limited to 10 and sorted by quantity desc; FE still may defensively merge missing payment rows but must not hide unknown/missing data silently in tests.

### Implementation Guidance

Recommended components:

```txt
pos-web/src/routes/admin/reports/sections/
├── revenue-by-payment-method.tsx
├── revenue-by-payment-method.test.tsx
├── top-products-table.tsx
└── top-products-table.test.tsx
```

Formatting utilities to reuse:
- `formatVnd` from `pos-web/src/shared/lib/format-vnd.ts`.
- `formatDmyDisplay` if showing range text; not required for these sections.
- `Intl.NumberFormat('vi-VN')` for order counts / quantities.

Payment mapping:

```ts
const PAYMENT_METHODS = [
  { value: 'cash', label: 'Tiền mặt', color: 'var(--color-primary)' },
  { value: 'transfer', label: 'Chuyển khoản', color: 'var(--color-accent)' },
  { value: 'card', label: 'Thẻ', color: 'var(--color-secondary, #64748b)' },
] as const
```

If CSS var fallback inside inline style is not accepted by lint/type, use semantic classes instead. Keep text labels visible.

Top products sorting:
- Use `useMemo`.
- Always clone: `[...data].sort(...)`.
- Default sort state `'quantity'`; revenue button sets `'revenue'`.
- Tie-breaker: `a.productName.localeCompare(b.productName, 'vi')`.

### Previous Story Intelligence (4.3)

Story 4.3 established patterns to reuse:
- `RevenueByDayChart` uses `role="img"`, `aria-label`, Recharts, `formatVnd`, and optional table fallback.
- `TotalOrdersSummary` shows `Đang cập nhật` with `aria-live="polite"` and keeps data during background refetch.
- Tests mock `apiClient.get` and assert exactly one `metric=all` call.
- Recent commit `38053e0 feat: complete story 4-3` modified only reports page + section components; follow same file organization and test style.
- Story 4.3 success test still expects Story 4.4 placeholders; this story must update that expectation.

### Regression Guardrails

- Do not install new dependencies for a table/progress-bar implementation. `recharts` is already present if you choose chart, but a semantic list/table is simpler and more accessible.
- Do not change backend, Prisma, report query params, auth, route paths, `/auth/login`, `/api/v1/orders`, or admin routing.
- Do not refetch `metric=revenue_by_payment_method` or `metric=top_products` separately; this would violate Story 4.2/4.3 data flow and double-load reports.
- Do not use product IDs or product detail links; top products are snapshot-only by requirement.
- Do not use `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`; React text escaping is enough for productName.
- Do not show raw technical errors in UI; Story 4.2 global error handling remains source of truth.
- Do not mutate `query.data.topProducts`; always clone before sorting.

### Testing Requirements

Use Vitest + Testing Library, matching existing tests:
- Import `@testing-library/jest-dom/vitest`.
- Use `userEvent` for sort button interactions.
- For ReportsPage integration, keep `QueryClientProvider + MemoryRouter` helper style from existing `reports-page.test.tsx`.
- Avoid flaky performance assertions in unit tests. For AC performance `<500ms`, document via simple render test/absence of heavy loops; do not add brittle timer benchmarks unless project already has such harness.

### Project Structure Notes

- This is FE-only; all code belongs under `pos-web/src/routes/admin/reports/sections/` plus update `reports-page.tsx` and tests.
- `features/admin/reports/api.ts` already has correct types; update only if tests reveal mismatch.
- `shared/components/ui/table.tsx` exists but current reports chart uses plain `<table>` with Tailwind. Either is acceptable; prefer consistency with existing reports section unless using shared table improves clarity.

### References

- `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md` — Story 4.4 AC and Epic 4 sequence.
- `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/ux-design-specification.md` — Admin reports journey, accessibility and responsive requirements.
- `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md` — reports endpoint, FE route structure, tech stack.
- `_bmad-output/project-context.md` — coding standards and module boundaries.
- `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/4-3-fe-revenue-by-day-chart-total-orders-summary-card.md` — previous story patterns and files.

### Completion Notes List

- Implemented payment-method revenue section with fixed cash/transfer/card order, Vietnamese labels, VND/order formatting, safe percent calculation, zero-order hint, accessible summary, and background updating indicator.
- Implemented top-products table with snapshot-only product names, max 10 rows, default quantity sorting, revenue sorting toggle, accessible Top 1–3 badges, non-mutating sort, caption, and keyboard/touch-friendly controls.
- Wired both sections into `ReportsPage` using existing `fetchReportsAll({ from, to })`, existing `reportsQueryKey(from, to)`, and existing SectionCard loading/empty/error behavior; no new query/fetch or dependency added.
- Updated reports integration tests and added section unit tests covering Story 4.4 behavior.
- Optional print CSS was not added; current implementation keeps text values visible alongside bars and table content remains print-readable by document flow.
- Code-review bookkeeping finding resolved: task/subtask checkboxes, Agent Model Used, Debug Log References, Completion Notes, File List, AC17 gate evidence, and sprint status are now updated for review.
